productDisplayName: Nike Men's T-Lite Leather White Shoe
description: The nike T-Lite 9 shoes is a gr eat combination of support and style. These training shoes offer all-around support, cushioning and durability to meet the demands of core performance. You can also team them with jeans and tees for a cool casual look.Upper Leather uppers for durability and comfort Perforations on the toe box, sides and heel counter for breathability Cushioned collar and tongue for plush comfort and snug Fit Lace-ups for snug fit and to lock the foot in place Appliquéd swoosh logo on the side to create a style statement Midsole Full-length phylon midsole for lightweight cushioning Mildly cushioned footbed for all-day comfort Outsole Phylite and solid rubber outsole for excellent traction on a variety of surfaces Flex grooves for flexibility and natural movement of the feet shoe careDo not machine washRemove dust and dirt with dry clean cloth
